creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
Hi,

for some reason, libquvi-scripts09 installs (in repo already existing) "lua51-luaexpat" instead of respecting default LUA version from Mk and building default version "luaexpat", and build fails:

===>   libquvi-scripts09-0.9.20131130_1 depends on package: lua52-bitop>=1.0.1 - found
===>   Returning to build of libquvi-scripts09-0.9.20131130_1
===>   libquvi-scripts09-0.9.20131130_1 depends on package: lua52-luaexpat>=1.2.0 - not found
===>   Installing existing package /packages/All/lua51-luaexpat-1.3.0_1.txz
[pkg.kappastar.com] Installing lua51-luaexpat-1.3.0_1...
[pkg.kappastar.com] `-- Installing expat-2.2.0_1...
[pkg.kappastar.com] `-- Extracting expat-2.2.0_1: .......... done
[pkg.kappastar.com] `-- Installing lua51-5.1.5_9...
[pkg.kappastar.com] `-- Extracting lua51-5.1.5_9: ......... done
[pkg.kappastar.com] Extracting lua51-luaexpat-1.3.0_1: .. done
===>   libquvi-scripts09-0.9.20131130_1 depends on package: lua52-luaexpat>=1.2.0 - not found
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/multimedia/libquvi-scripts09
====>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for libquvi-scripts09-0.9.20131130_1
build of multimedia/libquvi-scripts09 ended at Mon Feb 20 13:49:32 CET 2017
build time: 00:00:07
!!! build failure encountered !!!

Any help appretiated
